hudson.tasks.Shell.command:
# first run: Apr 9, 2026 cd /var/www/html/eol_php8_code/update_resources/connectors
# OK1: This will add higherClassification in taxon.tab and rebuild the DwCA. With carry-over of other extensions. # No parentID but has ancestry, though limited still. # generates AnimalDiversityWeb-with-hC.tar.gz php dwca_utility.php _ '{"resource_id": "AnimalDiversityWeb", "task": "gen_hC_using_ancestry"}' #using kingdom, phylum, class, order, family, genus
# OK2: This use gnparser one name at a time. Not entire file. # generates AnimalDiversityWeb-with-hC_neo4j_1.tar.gz php run_gnparser_dwca.php _ '{"resource_id": "AnimalDiversityWeb-with-hC"}' #gen neo4j_1
# OK3: Start matching taxa # generates AnimalDiversityWeb-with-hC_neo4j_1_eolID.tar.gz # Here is version for Zenodo. Next versions are for importing to Neo4j. php match_taxa_2DH.php _ '{"resource_id": "AnimalDiversityWeb-with-hC_neo4j_1", "AncestryIndexVer": "new"}' #OK gen +_eolID
# OK4: Convert taxon.tab, use EOLid value for taxonID. # REMINDER: Multiple scinames with different taxonIDs may have the same canonical thus will have the same EOLid # Reminder: All taxonID is now EOLid. Images from Media tab now excluded. # generates AnimalDiversityWeb_final.tar.gz php use_EOLid_as_taxonID.php _ '{"resource_id": "AnimalDiversityWeb-with-hC_neo4j_1_eolID"}' # gen AnimalDiversityWeb_finale
# rename cd /var/www/html/eol_php8_code/applications/content_server/resources_3 cp AnimalDiversityWeb_finale.tar.gz AnimalDiversityWeb_TraitBank_1_0.tar.gz ls -lt AnimalDiversityWeb_finale.tar.gz ls -lt AnimalDiversityWeb_TraitBank_1_0.tar.gz rm -f AnimalDiversityWeb_finale.tar.gz
